title: clinopodium schusteri
intro: Clinopodium schusteri, also known as Schuster's calamint or mountain calamint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This perennial plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, due to its high content of essential oils and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Clinopodium schusteri include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Clinopodium schusteri can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried herb for various herbal preparations, such as topical creams and inhalers for respiratory issues.
